title: ConversionResult
description: JSON result returned by a conversion endpoint when filename/webhook is used or encode is true.

url.description: Temporary download URL for the generated document (when filename/webhook is used).

filesize.description: Size of the generated document in bytes.

duration.description: Total time taken to generate the document, in milliseconds.

response.description: Details about loading the source document.

status-code.description: HTTP status code PDFShift received when loading an HTTP source.

executed.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the conversion ran.

pdf_pages.description: Total number of pages in the generated PDF.
